conversion_method: Historical sighting-based lunar calendar mapping for Bangladesh (Islamic Foundation Bangladesh). Standard lunar shift of approximately 10-12 days earlier per Gregorian calendar year was validated using actual astronomical reports and national announcements.

holidays.name: Eid-ul-Fitr 2024
holidays.description: Marking the end of Ramadan. High transaction velocity of cash_outs and peer-to-peer transfers starting 5 days prior.

holidays.name: Eid-ul-Adha 2024
holidays.description: Festival of Sacrifice. Massive cash_out velocity for purchasing cattle and high cash_in at leather markets shortly after.

holidays.name: Eid-ul-Fitr 2025
holidays.description: Marking the end of Ramadan. Shifts 11 days earlier than 2024. Heavy digital-to-cash conversions nationwide.

holidays.name: Eid-ul-Adha 2025
holidays.description: Festival of Sacrifice. Massive physical cash demand in cattle markets (Haats).

holidays.name: Eid-ul-Fitr 2026
holidays.description: Marking the end of Ramadan. Major liquidity pressure nationwide as salaries are disbursed early.

holidays.name: Eid-ul-Adha 2026
holidays.description: Festival of Sacrifice. High cash drawer depletion risks for agents across Bangladesh.
